task_name: ﻿To do model groups in xLights, click Layout, create a model group calle
problem_statement: ﻿To do model groups in xLights, click Layout, create a model group called Arches_All, and include all arch models.
step_by_step_solution: ["\ufeffTo do model groups in xLights, click Layout, create a model group called Arches_All, and include all arch models.", "Right click the sequence grid and drag the Chase effect onto the model group row.", "For WLED controllers, map universes carefully and verify output on the preview before export."]
prerequisites: ["Controller definitions are configured.", "Models are present in layout with valid naming.", "WLED device is reachable and mapped."]
common_mistakes: ["If this happens and one arch runs backward, reverse that arch direction in model orientation.", "Common mistake: applying both effects to individual arches instead of the group."]
troubleshooting_notes: ["If this happens and one arch runs backward, reverse that arch direction in model orientation."]
helix_relevance: Effect placement engine should support group-level application and model group routing.
